root.hardware:
<#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true >
25G_cage nokia-hwi:cage-uni CHASSIS 1
25G_transceiver bbf-hwt:transceiver 25G_cage 0
</#if>
<#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-1G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-1G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-5G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-5G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-10-100M" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-10-100M CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-25G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-25G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-2.5G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-2.5G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-10G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-10G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-40G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-40G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if special\-integrated\-ONUs?has_content && special\-integrated\-ONUs== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 CHASSIS unlocked </#if> <#if virtual\-board\-number?has_content>
${virtual\-board\-number} <#if port\-id?has_content > ${port\-id} </#if>
</#if> <#if power\-over\-ethernet\-control?has_content && power\-over\-ethernet\-control == true >
true 0 high
</#if> <#if power\-over\-ethernet\-control?has_content && power\-over\-ethernet\-control != true >
false
</#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "veip" > VEIPPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number} CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:virtual-port </#if> <#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} 25G_transceiver ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:transceiver-link </#if>
